shortDescription: Well-maintained 2-bedroom semi in East End with updated kitchen and south-facing garden.
fullDescription: Welcome to 180 Coxwell Avenue in the vibrant East End neighbourhood. This charming semi-detached home seamlessly blends period character with modern comfort. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. All 2 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. Additional highlights include in-suite laundry, ample storage, and energy-efficient mechanicals. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Chef’s kitchen with granite countertops and premium appliances
